response.justification: The candidate's resume lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of strong C++ development experience on Windows platforms, which is a core requirement for this role. While they have prior C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), it does not meet the expected depth or duration. Additionally, there is no evidence of fixed-income or investment banking domain knowledge, fixed-income derivatives experience, or Summit platform exposure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages (C++, D, JavaScript, TypeScript, etc.)
Strong background in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Proven ability to work in diverse domains (GIS, robotics, AI agents, investment practices)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows (only ~6 months at National Instruments, not 5–10 years)
No domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets
Lacks critical technical skills like SQL Server/Oracle expertise or messaging frameworks
